footer.tagline: Studio classes, memberships, and member tools — one calm place to plan your practice.

hero.lead: Studio sessions, retreats, and member journals — gathered into one calm flow that adapts to how you practice.

waitlist.title: Waitlist
waitlist.lead: Hold your place — we'll let you know the moment a spot opens.

explore.title: Explore
explore.lead: Stories, retreats, and editorial notes from the studio — refreshed each week.

featured.title: The Power of Breath
featured.excerpt: Three rituals our coaches keep returning to — small habits that quietly recentre the day.
featured.imageAlt: Close-up of a calm studio practice

tuscany.title: Spring in Tuscany
tuscany.excerpt: A 5-day reset among the cypress hills — yoga, slow meals, and quiet walks.

protocols.title: Enhanced Protocols
protocols.excerpt: How our reformer flows are evolving for stronger posture and softer recovery.

breath.title: Breath as anchor
breath.excerpt: A short series on breathwork to settle into class — or to begin the day at home.

gift.body: An Ommm gift card opens the studio for someone you love — classes, retreats, and quiet rituals, on their schedule.

marketing.heroSubtitle: Thoughtful scheduling, memberships, and class booking — a full studio experience on the web.
marketing.featureScheduleBody: See upcoming sessions, capacity, and coaches — book in a few taps when you are signed in.
marketing.featureMembershipsBody: Transparent plans with clear inclusions. Subscribe when Stripe is configured, or manage with the team.
marketing.featureUpdatesBody: Stories, events, and updates in Explore — published from your admin content tools.
marketing.closingBody: Create an account to book, manage memberships, and keep your practice organized.
marketing.storyLead: Ommm is built around clarity, presence, and sustainable practice — online and in the studio.
marketing.storyP1: We believe scheduling and memberships should feel calm, not cluttered. The platform keeps members oriented: what is next, what is included, and how to stay in touch.
marketing.storyP2: Editorial content in Explore can grow with you — replace placeholder copy with your own narrative as the studio evolves.
marketing.coachesPageLead: Meet the people guiding classes at Ommm.
marketing.coachesEmpty: No active coach profiles yet — add coaches from the admin backoffice.
marketing.coachesError: We could not load coaches right now. Please try again shortly.
marketing.membershipsPageLead: Choose a plan that fits how often you want to practice.
marketing.membershipsEmpty: No plans are published yet. Check back soon or contact the studio.
marketing.membershipsError: We could not load plans. Please try again later.
marketing.membershipsLoginHint: Log in or create an account to subscribe.
marketing.homeFeaturesLead: A single flow from discovery to booking — clear on every screen size.
